name: CC Collab 2025 Sticker Capsule
description: This Sticker Capsule commemorates the 2025 ClassicCounter Collaboration named ''parasite''. It includes signatures from the 9 different editors that have worked on the project.

name: ClassicCounter Community Sticker Capsule #1
description: This capsule contains old stickers that aren't normally available in Sticker Capsules. It was made to be able to receive them by playing on ClassicCounter servers.

name: ClassicCounter Community Sticker Capsule #2
description: This capsule contains new custom stickers that were made for ClassicCounter. These are not original designs.

name: Community Sticker Capsule 1
description: This capsule contains a single community-designed sticker. A portion of the proceeds is shared equally among the included creators.

items.name: Sticker | To B or not to B

name: DreamHack 2014 Legends (Holo/Foil)
description: This capsule contains a single DreamHack 2014 participant Holo or Foil sticker. A portion of the proceeds is shared equally among the included organizations.

name: DreamHack Cluj-Napoca 2015 Challengers (Foil)
description:
This capsule contains a single DreamHack Cluj-Napoca 2015 participant Foil sticker.

50% of the proceeds from the sale of this capsule support the included organizations.

That sticker can be applied to any weapon you own and can be scraped to look more worn. You can scrape the same sticker multiple times, making it a bit more worn each time, until it is removed from the weapon.
